name: asteroid-game
description: This is a small asteroid game for multiplayer using typescript, sockets and p5 canvas.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @simple-asteroid-game/client" "npm run dev --workspace @simple-asteroid-game/server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @simple-asteroid-game/client && npm run build --workspace @simple-asteroid-game/server
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @simple-asteroid-game/client && npm run check --workspace @simple-asteroid-game/server

author: Rico Trebeljahr
